title: API no-network client shim (compile-time friendly)

task.description: Provide a small, typed shim that can be imported instead of real API calls in MVP. Any attempt to call it throws a LocalOnlyMvpError. This keeps the API layer present without adding endpoints or network behavior.
acceptance_criteria: `src/lib/api/noNetworkClient.ts` exports `apiGet()` and `apiPost()` helpers that always throw via `throwIfApiCalled()`
Calling either helper throws an error with `name === "LocalOnlyMvpError"`
No changes are made to the template API client; this file is additive and the app compiles

definition_of_done: No network requests occur from this module
Functions are typed and can be imported without runtime side effects
api_contract: GET/POST (shim) → throws LocalOnlyMvpError (MVP has no cloud API)
